title: Live staged export + atlas coherence report CLI pipeline proof
problem: Tickets 289–290 split coherence analysis across pytest module and standalone CLI. Operators need an opt-in live_network proof that chains staged orchestrator → export-atlas-snapshot → atlas-coherence-report on temp paths with stdout/json artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: Opt-in live_network pytest runs orchestrator, export-atlas-snapshot CLI, atlas-coherence-report CLI on temp paths.
Asserts coherence CLI stdout overall_coherence_verdict and written report JSON paths.
Layer-3 unsuitable_live_artifact skip preserved; default pytest unchanged.
No public export, public-site, or schema changes.
non_goals: Public atlas route or site UI.
rollback_plan: Remove live_network pipeline test module only.
category: Phase 3 / live research proof / Research Atlas operator pipeline
